{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032302081501BAC2782AE40F100D16\"}"},"total":177},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7412213528163828505","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"生活是现实更是期盼！其实，现在的小说或者故事，都蕴含着眼泪和微笑，扎挣与上进等等各种矛盾的交织，特别是有了一定的生活经验之后，会在不自觉间流露出一种所谓的怀旧。故事是生活的积累，没有谁会不在自己的脑海里构筑幸福的方式！很多事，值得我们记下来并讲给别人听！\n故事很棒很静，很多句子猝不及防地击痛人心。赞，值得也必须推荐！[笑][笑][笑][笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725793417,"group_id":"7192507601618209847","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"好书不厌百回读","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N70tRJoc7C3Zv1d9VWkHI1CJHxFOiX6WrNI4nHfhy5dA","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1049363665923891","user_name":"右手青衣"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1049363665923891","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1726028699,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#FFFFFF","can_worn":false,"id":16,"name":"423读书日","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c7865e1c9cc3ce8d4613e7f52dc0fd34","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/421c11bb754900f4bca176159b2e320a"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家Lv.2\",\"title_id\":\"author_level_2\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家Lv.2\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7192507601618209847","book_info":{"abstract":"生活中的点点滴滴，点点滴滴的生活。汇聚成一副乡村变迁图。一代又一代的梦想，山沟沟里艰苦奋斗，熬过了冬天，春天绿的景色，夏天的农作物满山遍野，秋天总是喜悦的。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob48893a1a83341510657a4d4c9eca43c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"山野露珠","author_id":"","book_id":"7192507601618209847","book_name":"乡村纪实","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b8b8b0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":261,\"name\":\"都市日常\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261\u0026name=都市日常\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":11,\"name\":\"乡村\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11\u0026name=乡村\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7192507729712251392","read_count":"247","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"260144"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"109","tags":"都市日常,都市,乡村","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ob48893a1a83341510657a4d4c9eca43c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779386895\u0026x-signature=HNgxhHjqu77trtfq9b7rCAA3hFo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2564488778483117","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"86"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032302081501BAC2782AE40F100D16\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":18745,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration
